date_notes: Passed in first UCP budget, June 2019.
title_en: Province reinstates lower youth minimum wage of $13/hour for workers under 18
title_fr: La province rétablit un salaire minimum inférieur de 13 $/h pour les travailleurs de moins de 18 ans
description_en: The government reinstates a two-tier minimum wage, setting $13/hour for workers under 18 — $2/hour below the general minimum of $15/hour — reversing the previous government's single-tier rate.
